label: Alert
summary: An inline message bar in info, warn and error flavors; no animation, it is just there.
era: The plain message bar, "Your entry has been added", sitting in the page like news, no animation.

classes.name: rs-alert
classes.role: inline message bar: icon slot plus text

classes.name: rs-alert--error
classes.role: modifier: #FFCCCC with red border; carries role="alert"

a11y: Static variants are just text where they stand; only --error carries role="alert", so errors injected after load get announced.
